queries.question: Which photographers have a pricing of 700 and which videographers have the same pricing?
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings JOIN Pricing ON JobPostings.pricingID = Pricing.pricingID
WHERE (JobPostings.visualArtProfession = "Photographer" OR JobPostings.visualArtProfession = "Videographer") AND Pricing.price = 700
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?pricing a :Pricing .
  ?jobpostings p:hasPricing ?pricing .
  ?jobpostings p:title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:visualArtProfession ?visualartprofession_w .
  ?jobpostings p:visualArtProfession ?visualartprofession_w2 .
  ?pricing p:price ?price_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?visualartprofession_w) = "Photographer" || STR(?visualartprofession_w2) = "Videographer")) && (STR(?price_w) = "700" || STR(?price_w) = "700.0")))
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all photographers and also provide a list of videographers with a pricing of 700.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings JOIN Pricing ON JobPostings.pricingID = Pricing.pricingID
WHERE JobPostings.visualArtProfession = "Photographer" OR JobPostings.visualArtProfession = "Videographer" AND Pricing.price = 700
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?pricing a :Pricing .
  ?jobpostings p:hasPricing ?pricing .
  ?jobpostings p:title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:visualArtProfession ?visualartprofession_w .
  ?jobpostings p:visualArtProfession ?visualartprofession_w2 .
  ?pricing p:price ?price_w .
  FILTER((STR(?visualartprofession_w) = "Photographer" || (STR(?visualartprofession_w2) = "Videographer" && (STR(?price_w) = "700" || STR(?price_w) = "700.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show photographers and videographers with a pricing of 700.
